Class Board

java.lang.Object
sudokusolver.sudoku.Board
public class Board extends Object
Represents a Sudoku board which is a grid of cells, where each cell can have an assigned value, be empty, or be outside the puzzle.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Board()
    Initializes an empty board.
    Board(String text)
    Initializes the board from a string representation.
    Board(List<List<Integer>> grid)
    Initializes the board with a 2D list of integers, where each inner list represents a row of the Sudoku grid.
    Board(Map<Cell,Integer> cellValues)
    Initializes the board with a map of cell coordinates involved in the puzzle to their values or 0 for empty cells.

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board(List<List<Integer>> grid)
      Initializes the board with a 2D list of integers, where each inner list represents a row of the Sudoku grid. Empty cells should be represented by 0 and cells not involved in the puzzle can be represented by -1 or any negative number. The top-left cell has coordinates (0, 0).
      Parameters:
      grid - the 2D list of integers representing the Sudoku grid

    • Board

      public Board(String text)
      Initializes the board from a string representation. The string should consist of rows of characters, where each character represents a cell. Valid characters are: - Digits '1' to '9' for values 1 to 9 - Letters 'A' to 'Z' for values 10 to 35 - '.' for empty cells (value 0) - Any other character (e.g., space) for cells not involved in the puzzle Rows should be separated by newline characters ('\n'). The top-left cell has coordinates (0, 0).
      Parameters:
      text - the string representation of the Sudoku grid

    • Board

      public Board()
      Initializes an empty board.

    • Board

      public Board(Map<Cell,Integer> cellValues)
      Initializes the board with a map of cell coordinates involved in the puzzle to their values or 0 for empty cells.
      Parameters:
      cellValues - the map of cell coordinates to their values

  • Method Details

    • fromStringMap

      public static Board fromStringMap(Map<String,Integer> cellValues)
      Creates a Board instance from a map of cell coordinates to their values or 0 for empty cells. Keys in the map are string representations of Cell objects.
      Parameters:
      cellValues - the map of cell coordinates to their values
      Returns:
      a Board instance representing the given cell values

    • getCells

      public Set<Cell> getCells()
      Returns a set of all cells involved in the puzzle.
      Returns:
      a set of all cells involved in the puzzle

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the board. Finds the bounding box of the cells involved in the puzzle and constructs a string representation of that area.

      Cells are represented as follows:

      • Empty cells: '.'
      • Cells not involved in the puzzle: ' ' (space)
      • Values 1-9: '1' to '9'
      • Values 10-35: 'A' to 'Z'

      Rows are separated by newline characters ('\n').

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation of the board

    • copy

      public Board copy()

    • maxAssignedValue

      public int maxAssignedValue()
